```{r setup}
library(rlevante)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
dataset_spec <- list(
  list(name = "pilot_uniandes_co_bogota_processed:d0c5", version = "v4_1"),
  list(name = "pilot_uniandes_co_rural_processed:bxgv",  version = "v4_2"),
  list(name = "pilot_mpieva_de_main_processed:8wjx",     version = "v3_1"),
  list(name = "pilot_western_ca_main_processed:bgcj",    version = "v3_2"))

# fetch processed runs
runs <- map(dataset_spec, \(ds) get_scores(ds$name, ds$version))

run_data <- runs |>
  list_rbind() |>
  arrange(task_id, redivis_source)

write_rds(run_data, here("01_fetched_data/run_data.rds"), compress = "gz")
```

```{r}
# fetch processed trials
trials <- map(dataset_spec, \(ds) get_trials(ds$name, ds$version))
write_rds(trials, here("01_fetched_data/trials.rds"), compress = "gz")

# nest by site and dataset
task_data_nested <- trials |>
  list_rbind() |>
  left_join(run_data |> select(run_id, adaptive, language)) |> # filter(chance == 0) TODO: check on missing chance values
  mutate(chance = if_else(item_task == "hf", 0.5, chance)) |> # temporary hotfix for wrong HF chance values
  nest(data = -c(item_task, language)) |>
  filter(item_task != "ha") |>
  arrange(item_task, language)

write_rds(task_data_nested, here("01_fetched_data/task_data_nested.rds"), compress = "gz")
```
